title: The egg mod
description: This is supposed to be a mod that adds better stockings for eggs and more foods
body:
This mod is supposed to add small and big omelets, fried eggs, egg boxes, and double and quadruple eggs.

This wider range of egg items is made for consumption or better storage. Since the egg item can only be in stacks of 16, I made it so that you can put eggs together for easy storage. (no triple eggs)

Here are the crafting recipes:
![This is the crafting recipe for a double egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf67bc45ea6d5627a17c6360411f907b40ebf1c0.png)![This is one of the crafting recipes for the quadruple egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e98a84337e7663e9f73b971a9de57fe557940ae.png)![This is another one of the crafting recipe for a quadruple egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d45201a5c918a899837736e088b217a889720cb2.png)![This is the crafting recipe for the egg block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a38b6ef2c777ed424bdcb1d208b88ecc612bd590.png)![This is the reverse crafting recipe for the egg block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad8766f5b205565c6898b973abc111ac0f42f21.png)![This is the cooking recipe for a big omelet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9946afadf2ff85f88949f1b3b50231b3e0fdd815.png)![This is the cooking recipe for a small omelet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5f655d2a03978c0cc4ecd8e4a2ede8f32a5afc2.png)![This is the cooking recipe for a fried egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa50ee16ac99fafe04b8a3a84c18992f79b304cb.png)
